top3.sql:
SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
);

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
);

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
);

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN attribute a ON ha.attribute_id = a.id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
);

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
);

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
)
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE ha.attribute_value = (
    SELECT MAX(attribute_value)
    FROM hero_attribute
);
